name: Allied Cash Advance
description_short: Allied Cash Advance at 1021 AZ-89 Suite #101, Chino Valley, AZ 86323 is Mon-Fri 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 76 reviews. Call +1 928-636-1294.
description_long: Allied Cash Advance is a regional financial services provider operating physical locations, including a Mesa, Arizona storefront at 2706 East University Drive. The company specializes in short-term lending products designed to bridge immediate financial gaps for consumers who may not qualify for traditional bank loans. Their primary offering is installment loans—unsecured personal loans repaid on a fixed schedule—marketed for major purchases, bill consolidation, and unexpected expenses. The company also offers Netspend Prepaid Mastercard products and refinancing/reloading options for existing customers. The Mesa location provides in-store applications completed in minutes, with funding available as quickly as 30 minutes using a debit card or the next business day for online applications. The store maintains accessible hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturday) and advertises a high Google rating (4.9 stars from 377 reviews as of the content date). Customers can also apply online or upload documentation remotely. The company accepts applicants with no credit history or bad credit, as credit is only one factor in their underwriting process. Allied Cash Advance distinguishes itself through speed of funding and willingness to work with underbanked consumers. The company requires proof of active checking account (30+ days), valid government ID, proof of income, and working phone number—lower barriers than traditional lenders. In Arizona, vehicle ownership proof is also required. Customer reviews emphasize staff professionalism and patience during the application process, with multiple mentions of a staff member named Sarah providing exceptional service. The company does not disclose APR, fees, or maximum loan amounts on the provided webpage, making it impossible to assess true cost to borrowers. As an installment lender serving customers with limited credit access, rates are likely substantially higher than bank alternatives, though specific figures are unavailable from this source.
pros: Funding as fast as 30 minutes with debit card payment, or next business day for online applications
High customer satisfaction rating of 4.9 stars across 377 Google reviews
Willing to approve applicants with bad credit or no credit history
Multiple application channels: in-store, online, and phone where available
Low documentation requirements: active checking account, ID, income proof, and phone number
Quick application process stated to take minutes with same-day eSignature capability
Convenient retail locations with accessible hours including Saturday morning service
cons: Website currently down for system maintenance, limiting ability to verify current terms and apply online
APR, fees, and maximum loan amounts not disclosed on website, making cost comparison impossible
No information provided about credit impact or credit reporting practices
Installment loans to subprime borrowers typically carry significantly higher rates than traditional bank loans
Arizona-specific requirement for vehicle proof of ownership adds barrier for some applicants
best_for: Consumers with bad credit or no credit history needing quick emergency funds
Borrowers who need same-day or next-day funding and cannot wait for traditional bank processing
Unbanked or underbanked individuals seeking accessible lending without credit union membership
People consolidating bills or covering unexpected major expenses outside traditional lending channels
diagnosis: Allied Cash Advance is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers facing immediate cash needs who cannot access traditional bank loans due to poor or nonexistent credit. The primary caveat is that specific pricing, APRs, and loan terms are not disclosed on the website, and the website was under maintenance at the time of this profile, making current product details unavailable for verification.
services: Installment loans (unsecured personal loans with fixed repayment schedules)
In-store loan applications with same-day funding
Online loan applications with next-business-day funding
Remote documentation upload for loan processing
Retail refinancing and reloaning for existing customers
Personal loan funding for major purchases and unexpected expenses
